plugins.name: sa
plugins.description: Simple Agents — command-free skills + subagents for fast single-feature development: plan, approve, isolate in a worktree, implement, PR — Sonnet build / Opus review

plugins.name: ha
plugins.description: Higher Agents — the thorough counterpart to sa for building ONE feature properly: deep red-teamed plan, SDD per-task loop plus a risk-scaled pre-PR adversarial gate, independent review, apply feedback, gated merge. Leverages the superpowers disciplines (required dependency); model-agnostic

plugins.name: ca
plugins.description: Cooperate Agents — Claude×Codex loop: draft a plan sparring with Codex, hand off to Codex to implement and open a draft PR, review that PR (gated, up to 2 rounds), then merge and clean up worktrees — full lifecycle, two co-located plugins
